response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, DLang libraries), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of people management experience and mobile platform focus, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven technical leadership via open-source projects and workshops
Broad stack expertise across mobile, web, and systems programming
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership experience
Mobile platform experience is limited to one iOS app takeover, not ecosystem-wide tooling
Lacks demonstrated experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
